meta.title: Living CV — Henry Rincón
meta.description: Henry Rincón's interactive résumé — Data & AI Engineer (DP-600 · AI-102): career, achievements and the AI-APPs pipeline apps as an animated editorial experience.

detalle.cta: Sounds like your team? Let's talk

cv.subtitulo: The same source that powers this page generates the PDF: they can never drift apart.

apps.subtitulo: Only what's real: what's being built and what's being explored. No promised dates.

brochure.cta: Sound like your team? Let's talk

roadmap.titulo: What's coming — and you set the order
roadmap.subtitulo: These are each app's next features. Vote for the ones you most want to see: one click, no sign-up. The counters are real.
roadmap.votos: {count, plural, =0 {no votes yet} one {# vote} other {# votes}}
roadmap.noDisponible: Voting isn't available right now. Please try again later.
roadmap.rateLimited: You're going too fast — wait a moment before voting again.
roadmap.error: I couldn't record your vote. Please try again in a moment.

contacto.subtitulo: Want to know if I'd fit on your team? Write to me — an app, a role or a technical conversation.

footer.creditos: Built in the open by the AI-APPs pipeline.

form.app: Which app do you want to try?
form.mensaje: Tell me what you'd use it for (optional)
form.errorEnvio: I couldn't send your request. Please try again in a moment.

confirmacion.cuerpo: I'll reply within 1–3 business days to the email you left.

notFound.cuerpo: The link may be broken or the page moved.

chat.disclaimer: I answer only with the content of this résumé and I can make mistakes: verify with the cited sources.
chat.sugerencia1: What did he do at Vesting?
chat.sugerencia3: What's his experience with Microsoft Fabric?
chat.fallbackAviso: The AI assistant isn't available right now, so here are the résumé excerpts that best answer your question:
chat.fallbackVacio: I couldn't find anything about that in the résumé. Try another question or write to Henry from the Contact section.
chat.rateLimited: Lots of questions in a row — give me a minute to breathe and we'll continue.
chat.error: I couldn't answer that one. Please try again.
